_purpose: Real closed-engagement outcomes for a FUTURE /results/ + /case-studies/ page. Conversion-ceiling asset.
_honesty: REAL, substantiable engagements ONLY. Anonymized (industry + state + situation; NO client/company names or re-identifying detail). No synthetic case studies, no invented outcomes, no fabricated quotes. A row is captured at engagement close from facts the founder provides.
_publish_gate: NOTHING publishes until there are enough substantiable rows the founder signs off on (target N>=5 distinct, each verifiable) AND publish_ok=y. Until then /results/ and /case-studies/ stay UNBUILT (founder do-not-build until real data).
_schema: engagement_id, service, industry, state, starting_situation, work_done, outcome, months_behind_at_intake, duration_weeks, cost_band, client_quote, substantiable, publish_ok
